title: stellaris autumnalis
intro: Stellaris autumnalis, also known as Star Anise, is a flowering evergreen shrub native to China and the Himalayas, known for its distinctive star-shaped fruit. The medicinal properties of Stellaris autumnalis include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as an expectorant to relieve congestion. In herbal preparations, Stellaris autumnalis is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as in traditional Chinese medicine to warm the body and relieve nausea.
